summary_one_line: Input must encode an ICC profile whose channel count is exactly 2 so DefaultInterpolatorsFactory dispatches the Duotone switch arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A profile that drives nInputChannels == 2 at the switch in DefaultInterpolatorsFactory, distinguishing case 2 (Duotone) from the dominant case-1 and case-3 arms; the cleanest input-side correlate is the byte at offset 0x2d which is 01 for all winners and 00 for all losers.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 12 winner-resolving seeds carry 01 at offset 0x2d and reach the case-2 arm (line 1213 W-only), with the branch hit 35 times in the W coverage and the case-2 interpolator BilinearInterp16 invoked (W=2, L=0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All loser-blocking seeds carry 00 at offset 0x2d and never enter case 2 (line 1213 shows L T=0), instead falling through to case-1/case-3 channel counts, so the Duotone arm stays blocked across all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator, which splices a logged comparison operand back into the matching input-byte position, letting it set the exact channel-count value that selects case 2; plain value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets CMP_MAP distance buckets, which give no gradient toward an equality value at a discrete switch dispatch.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the Duotone (case 2) arm of the input-channel switch in DefaultInterpolatorsFactory.
The only decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile via the I2S technique delta.
Winner resolves the branch 9/10 trials while loser blocks all 10.
Offset 0x2d is the single clean DIFFER offset: winners all 01, losers all 00.
The case-2 line is hit only by the winner-resolving seed set in the per-role overlay.
In the divergent-branch counts, case 2 has W T=35 but L T=0, i.e. losers never take the true arm.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1213  T=35 F=362  T=0 F=140  case 2: // Duotone  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The case-2 interpolator BilinearInterp16 runs under W but not L.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace to the mutator stack.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, holding only CMP_MAP distance feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2130 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 006035891e3a6630` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 16 of the 17-level ancestor chain; the tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 16', the dash-row floor signal exclusive to cmplog/vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose case-2 dispatch value sits at an input offset where value_profile resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing the discrete equality dispatch does not depend on I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: That offset 0x2d (01 vs 00) is causally the channel-count selector rather than an incidental header-flag correlate is inferred from the byte diff, not confirmed against the ICC parse that computes nInputChannels.
